subtitle.en: A Secure Web Gateway that filters outbound DNS, network, and HTTP traffic
subtitle.zh: 過濾對外 DNS、網路與 HTTP 流量的安全網路閘道

tagline.en: A safety filter for everything your devices try to reach — blocks malware, phishing, and unwanted sites.
tagline.zh: 替你裝置「想連出去的所有東西」把關 —— 擋掉惡意程式、釣魚與不該上的網站。

label.zh: 免費 Zero Trust 名額

text.en: Cloudflare Gateway is a Secure Web Gateway (SWG): it inspects the traffic leaving your devices and decides what's allowed out. It blocks dangerous or unwanted destinations before a connection is ever made.
text.zh: Cloudflare Gateway 是一個「安全網路閘道(Secure Web Gateway,SWG)」:它檢查從你裝置「往外送出」的流量,決定什麼能出去。在連線真正建立之前,就先擋掉危險或不該連的目的地。

text.en: While a WAF protects traffic coming into your website, Gateway protects traffic going out from your people and devices — like a filter for your whole team's or family's internet use.
text.zh: WAF 保護的是「進入你網站」的流量;Gateway 保護的則是「你的人與裝置往外連出去」的流量 —— 等於替整個團隊或全家人的上網行為加一層過濾。

text.en: A water filter on your tap. Every drop (request) passes through it; clean water flows, but contaminants (malware, phishing, blocked categories) get caught before reaching the glass.
text.zh: 水龍頭上的濾水器。每一滴水(每個請求)都流經它;乾淨的水流出來,但雜質(惡意程式、釣魚、被封鎖的分類)在進到杯子前就被攔下。

text.en: Gateway can filter at three depths. You can start with just DNS (the easiest) and add the deeper layers later.
text.zh: Gateway 可以在三種深度做過濾。你可以先從最簡單的 DNS 開始,之後再加上更深的層次。

text.en: The fastest layer. When a device asks 'what's the IP of this domain?', Gateway can refuse to answer for bad domains — blocking them before they load. Sees domain names, not full URLs.
text.zh: 最快的一層。當裝置問「這個網域的 IP 是多少?」時,Gateway 可以對壞網域拒絕回答 —— 在它載入前就擋掉。它看得到網域名稱,但看不到完整網址。

text.en: Inspects raw packets by IP, port, and protocol. Useful for non-web services like SSH or RDP.
text.zh: 依 IP、連接埠、通訊協定檢查原始封包。適合 SSH、RDP 這類非網頁服務。

text.en: The deepest layer. Inspects full URLs, uploads, and downloads — even inside HTTPS — to scan for malware or data leaks. Needs a certificate installed on devices.
text.zh: 最深的一層。檢查完整網址、上傳與下載 —— 連 HTTPS 內部都看 —— 用來掃描惡意程式或資料外洩。需要在裝置上安裝一張憑證。

text.en: Stops devices from reaching known-malicious or scam sites organization-wide.
text.zh: 全公司一起,阻止裝置連到已知的惡意或詐騙網站。

text.en: Block whole categories — adult content, gambling — for schools, families, or offices.
text.zh: 整類封鎖 —— 成人內容、賭博 —— 適合學校、家庭或辦公室。

text.en: Prevent uploading confidential files to personal cloud storage.
text.zh: 防止把機密檔案上傳到個人雲端硬碟。

text.en: With the WARP client, protection follows remote and travelling employees.
text.zh: 搭配 WARP 用戶端,保護跟著遠端與出差的員工走。

text.en: First you decide how traffic reaches Gateway, then you write policies. Here's the quickest path: block malware via a DNS policy.
text.zh: 先決定流量怎麼送到 Gateway,再來寫政策。以下是最快的做法:用一條 DNS 政策擋掉惡意程式。

text.en: Two options. WARP client: install Cloudflare's app on devices — enables all three layers plus identity. DNS location: point your network's DNS to Cloudflare — simplest, DNS filtering only.
text.zh: 兩種選擇。WARP 用戶端:在裝置上安裝 Cloudflare 的 App —— 啟用全部三層加上身分辨識。DNS location:把你網路的 DNS 指向 Cloudflare —— 最簡單,只做 DNS 過濾。

text.en: In the Zero Trust dashboard go to Gateway → Firewall policies → DNS, then Add a policy.
text.zh: 在 Zero Trust 儀表板進入 Gateway → Firewall policies → DNS,然後 Add a policy(新增政策)。

text.en: Set a condition matching the Security threats categories, choose action Block, and save. It deploys worldwide in under a minute.
text.zh: 設定條件,選 Security threats(資安威脅)分類,動作選 Block(封鎖),儲存。不到一分鐘就全球生效。

code.body:
Selector:  Security Categories
Operator:  in
Value:     Malware, Phishing, Command & Control
Action:    Block

text.en: Add another DNS policy matching Content Categories (e.g. Adult Themes) with action Block to filter unwanted content.
text.zh: 再加一條 DNS 政策,比對 Content Categories(內容分類,例如成人主題),動作選 Block,過濾不該看的內容。

text.en: Open Logs → Gateway to see which domains were queried and blocked, then tune policies that are too strict.
text.zh: 打開 Logs → Gateway,看哪些網域被查詢、被擋,再調整太嚴格的政策。

text.en: A security checkpoint all outbound traffic passes through to be filtered.
text.zh: 所有對外流量都會經過的安全檢查哨,在這裡被過濾。

text.en: An if-this-then-that rule. Conditions match traffic; actions allow, block, or override.
text.zh: 一條「如果…就…」的規則。條件比對流量;動作決定允許、封鎖或覆寫。

text.en: Cloudflare groups domains (malware, gambling, social media) so you filter by type, not one by one.
text.zh: Cloudflare 把網域分群(惡意程式、賭博、社群媒體),讓你按類型過濾,不用一個一個列。

text.en: Cloudflare's device app that sends traffic to Gateway and unlocks network + HTTP filtering.
text.zh: Cloudflare 的裝置 App,把流量導向 Gateway,並解鎖網路與 HTTP 過濾。

text.en: A network whose DNS points at Cloudflare; the no-install way to get DNS filtering.
text.zh: 把 DNS 指向 Cloudflare 的一個網路;免安裝就能做 DNS 過濾的方式。

text.en: Lets HTTP filtering look inside encrypted traffic. Requires installing Cloudflare's certificate.
text.zh: 讓 HTTP 過濾能看進加密流量內部。需要安裝 Cloudflare 的憑證。

title.zh: 先從只做 DNS 開始

text.en: DNS filtering needs no software install and blocks the vast majority of malware and phishing for quick wins. Add the WARP client later when you want network and HTTP filtering.
text.zh: DNS 過濾不用裝任何軟體,就能擋掉絕大多數惡意程式與釣魚,快速見效。等你想做網路與 HTTP 過濾時,再加上 WARP 用戶端。

en: Gateway is part of Cloudflare Zero Trust; the free plan covers up to 50 users.
Policies are evaluated in order: DNS first, then network, then HTTP.
Changes deploy globally in under a minute.
HTTP filtering (inspecting inside HTTPS) requires installing Cloudflare's certificate on devices.
zh: Gateway 屬於 Cloudflare Zero Trust;免費方案涵蓋最多 50 位使用者。
政策依序評估:先 DNS,再網路,最後 HTTP。
變更不到一分鐘就全球生效。
HTTP 過濾(看進 HTTPS 內部)需要在裝置上安裝 Cloudflare 的憑證。
